objective: Map the tightest integration and downstream task consequences for 'Independent Model Inference Microservice Layer'.
evidence: C42 already carries runtime-facing inference selection metadata.
C47 already owns model intake, adaptation, quarantine, and promotion.
The missing seam is an internal control plane for model-pool scheduling, GPU habitat allocation, batching, quotas, and promotion-aware routing.

likely_downstream_task_shapes: One new FULL PIPELINE task for an internal inference orchestration/control-plane authority
Follow-on DIRECT SPEC updates to C45, C47, C18, and C22
Possible additive habitat/quarantine deployment refinement in C24

recommended_next_action: If pursued, frame it as an internal sovereign inference orchestration fabric rather than a literal independent microservice layer.
